content.en:
Taia Sun on the planet.

Zero was so angry that he attacked everywhere and killed several powerful Heavenly Monarchs before leaving.

What everyone didn't know was that Zero had a thirst for the Eternal Flame, and it was one of the treasures he had been collecting.

He could have been promoted to the True Spirit Realm early and became a True Monarch, but he never went to the promotion, not because of his background.

His strength is stronger than that of many Dao ancestors, and his potential is terrifying.

Even at the beginning, he was promoted at the peak of the Nine Stars, and he was a real peerless genius.

But he still has ambitions, and he wants to gather the strongest true spirits.

The focus of the True Spirit Realm is the True Spirit, and once the True Spirit is condensed, it can be called the half-step True Spirit Realm.

And the next step is the perfect combination of the true spirit and the physical body, and officially step into the realm of the true spirit, this step is a waste of time, especially the more powerful the physical body of the half-step true spirit, the longer it will take, but the more powerful the true spirit will become.

Zero is not a half-step true spirit, otherwise it would not have been on the Heavenly Monarch list for a long time.

But even if he didn't die half-step true spirits, those half-step true spirits in the great universe were not his opponents.

In the midst of chaos, true spirits are divided into lower true spirits, middle true spirits, higher true spirits, heavenly true spirits, supreme true spirits, and supreme true spirits.

Most Heavenly Monarchs can only condense the lower true spirits at most, but don't underestimate the lower true spirits, after all, ninety-nine percent of the Heavenly Monarchs don't even have the hope of condensing the true spirits, and it is already very good to be able to condense the lower true spirits.

Some Tianjiao were able to condense the supreme true spirit, while the true disciples of the Dao Ancestor force had the hope of condensing the supreme true spirit, but the probability was not too high.

As for the Supreme True Spirit, there was no hope for the Dao Ancestor Ancestor, and even many True Ancestors did not condense the Supreme True Spirit at the beginning.

Zero's goal is the Supreme True Spirit, and it is not difficult for him to condense the Supreme True Spirit.

However, it is not so simple to condense the Supreme True Spirit, and the three aspects of the Chaos Body, the Chaos Divine Power, and the Chaos Soul must reach an extremely terrifying level.

And for a long time, he has raised the Chaos Divine Power and the Chaos Soul to the extreme, and only the Chaos Body is still one step away, which is related to the alchemy technique he has cultivated, and it is only one step away from being complete, and what is missing is the Eternal Flame.

Once he obtained the Eternal Flame, he was able to condense the perfect Chaos Body, thus condensing the Supreme True Spirit in one fell swoop, and then fusing his body to step into the True Spirit Realm.

"It's just one step away!!"

Zero was extremely annoyed.

Although there are not many treasures to replace the Eternal Flame, all of them are extremely rare, and he has been searching for a long time in the chaos but has not found them, so he wants to enter the great universe to try his luck.

After all, the Great Universe will become a Dao Realm in the future, and all kinds of rare treasures will definitely be born, and he also has the hope of condensing the Supreme True Spirit.

And this time, the appearance of the Eternal Flame made him extremely excited, after all, in such a short time, the great universe gave birth to the treasure he wanted, and there was no need to wait for a long time.

But he never expected that with his strength, he did not snatch the Eternal Flame, but was taken away by an unknown Heavenly Monarch.

"The Great Realm has moved, hmph, don't let me know who you are, or you'll die!"

Zero swears secretly.

-------------

Ye Tian offended Zero, but he was not worried in his heart.

He knew that he couldn't hide it forever, once he exposed the Great Realm Shift in the future, his identity would naturally be exposed, but it was just a zero, it was just a long time of cultivation, and it was not a threat.

Ye Tian did not continue to cultivate in the Tai'a Sun Star, but returned to the Void Heaven Hall and began to retreat.

In addition, he also asked Yanglong Tianjun to leave the Tai'a Sun Star, so as not to fall on the Tai'a Sun Star.

This time, Yang Dragon Tianjun got the Solstice Yang Star Flower, as long as the retreat is refined, the time will increase significantly, and there is no need to continue the adventure in Tai'a Sun Star.

Besides, Ye Tian had already obtained the Eternal Flame, and there was no shortage of resources for the time being.

In the following days, Ye Tian worked hard to comprehend and cultivate the eternal fire.

Once he has cultivated the 25th Eternal Immortal Fire Extinguishing of the Chaos Divine Power, his strength will inevitably skyrocket.

20,000 years later.

Ye Tian's laughter came from the retreat room.

He finally practiced eternal fire.

"Eternity does not extinguish the fire, out!"

A ray of flame appeared in front of him, emitting a pale blue flame glow.

It looked like an ordinary flame, but it didn't seem to have any power, but Ye Tian was very aware of the horror of this eternal non-extinguishing fire, and the surrounding rules were gradually collapsing under the burning of the eternal non-extinguishing fire.

Moreover, eternity does not extinguish fire, nothing does not burn, and it is difficult to extinguish.

"Eternal Immortal Fire is only at the entry level, but it is already comparable to the Extreme Sword Divine Power of the Dacheng Realm, and to a certain extent, it is several times more terrifying than the Extreme Sword Divine Power. "

Ye Tian muttered.

He did not go out of the level, but continued to cultivate, preparing to realize the eternal immortal fire to the Xiaocheng realm, or even the Dacheng realm.

And this retreat took 500,000 years.

After 500,000 years of hard cultivation, Ye Tian finally cultivated the Eternal Immortal Fire Extinguishing to the peak realm of Xiaocheng, only one step away from the realm of Dacheng, but he fell into a bottleneck.

There is no way, the eternal fire extinguishing is too powerful, and the difficulty of comprehension is not ordinarily high, even if it is a god-level transcendent comprehension talent coupled with its own terrifying understanding, it is difficult to cultivate the eternal immortal extinguishing to the Dacheng realm in a short period of time.

With such a chaotic supernatural power, the difficulty of cultivating to the Dacheng realm is too high, and it is normal for those with insufficient talent to be in the Xiaocheng realm for a lifetime.

After all, once he reached the Dacheng realm, as long as he collected enough materials, he could refine the Eternal Immortal Fire Divine Power Inheritance, so that more people's inheritance would never extinguish the fire.

"Forget it, let's get out of the customs for the time being, continue to retreat, I'm afraid it will take millions of years to cultivate the eternal immortal fire to the Dacheng realm. The Eternal Immortal Fire Extinguishing ranked 25th on the Chaos Divine Power List is really not so simple to cultivate to the Dacheng realm, and my talent is still a little worse!"

Ye Tian sighed.

If other people heard Ye Tian's words, they would definitely be angry.

If Ye Tian's talent is poor, no one in the entire chaos will have a high talent.

And such chaotic supernatural powers as Eternal Immortal Fire Extinguishing, even if others meet the conditions, it is estimated that if they want to cultivate to the Xiaocheng realm, they will need to be measured in units of 100 million years, or even 1 billion years and 10 billion years.

Ye Tian was able to cultivate to the peak realm of Xiaocheng in just 500,000 years, which was already an incomparably exaggerated statement.

After leaving the customs, Ye Tian learned about it and found that his ranking on the Heavenly Monarch List had really improved a lot.

Previously, he was ranked 102nd on the Heavenly Monarch List, but now he has been promoted to the 46th place on the Heavenly Monarch List, directly entering the top 50 of the Heavenly Monarch List, and even surpassing Peng Yu Tianjun.

It can be said that Ye Tian's rapid ascension has already shocked the entire universe, and I don't know how many Heavenly Monarchs have discussed him, but he has been in retreat and doesn't know it.

"I've seen Daozi!"

A famous Heavenly Monarch of the Void Heaven Hall saw Ye Tian coming out of the customs and said respectfully.

Many Heavenly Monarchs even showed a look of worship, after all, Ye Tian's strength was improving so fast that it was unimaginable.

Among the Heavenly Monarchs, Pengyu Heavenly Monarch was also completely convinced, in the past, his strength was stronger than Ye Tian, and he dared to be called Ye Tian's senior brother, but now he never dared to.

Soon, these Heavenly Monarchs of the Void Heaven Hall were sent away by Ye Tian.

Ye Tian went back to the Terran and stayed with his family for a few days, and then contacted Yanglong Tianjun to learn about the recent situation.

Nothing major has happened in the last 500,000 years in the Great Universe, and the only thing is that Zero, who is the number one on the Heavenly Monarch List, found the Dark God Society and killed the three Heavenly Monarchs of the Dark God Society.

"It is estimated that after zero investigation, I think that the Heavenly Monarch who shot that day must be the Heavenly Monarch of the Dark God Society, and the Dark God Society will take the blame for me this time!" Ye Tian said with a smile.
